freeze_boundary: This registry documents vocabulary only. It does not authorize new metrics, insights, AI synthesis, or behavior-transition equations.
clean_data_principles: ClaimCompiler decides whether a bounded deterministic claim may emit.
Provider rows, operator/test/synthetic rows, voided tasks, and non-session tasks are excluded from explicit stopwatch clean-trace denominators unless separately reported.
Exposure contamination is a property of linked task/session evidence, not unrelated render rows.

clean_trace_ratio.definition: clean eligible explicit stopwatch sessions / all eligible explicit stopwatch sessions

provenance_levels.meaning: User-created or user-confirmed canonical app truth.
User-started stopwatch trace, subject to clean-data admission.
External provider fact or completion candidate that cannot silently become clean execution truth.
Operator, test, seed, or synthetic data that must be excluded or separately bucketed.
User/operator-corrected or stale-recovered row that may be useful but must not masquerade as clean raw trace.
Behavior-shaping surface was rendered or interacted with before the measured outcome.
